frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
frontend: SimpleTable: Fix stale defaultRowsPerPage after settings change

skipped.reason: 178 new candidates all had human review activity (all 178 checked)

style_guide: Commit subject format: area: SubArea: Description (capital first word after last colon)
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit)
No trailing period in commit subject
Approval style is warm and brief; CHANGES_REQUESTED for commit guideline violations before APPROVE
Reviewer @illume reviews PRs very quickly; copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] is not human review
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic
Fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable
Render-phase state mutations (setState during render) are anti-pattern; move to useEffect
useMemo with empty dep array as one-shot initialiser is anti-pattern; use lazy useState or direct call
CNCF CLA required; k8s-ci-robot bot comments do not count as human review
